Landback, Reparations, Join or Start a local Socialist Rifle Association, Worker Soviet, Mutual Aid Network, Tenants' Union, Unemployed Union, Trade Union, or Artists Union Today! https://socialistra.org/ https://mutualaidnetwork.org/ https://www.mutualaidhub.org/ https://olmsapps.dol.gov/olpdr/ https://ua.org/join-the-ua/find-a-local-union/ https://ndncollective.org/landback/ https://naacp.org/resources/reparations FP Edit: https://imgur.com/gallery/why-conservatives-get-to-cheat-bBmbR8z https://imgur.com/gallery/realpage-ykHFqu9 https://imgur.com/gallery/capitalism-sucks-blows-cGwPHvi https://imgur.com/gallery/lets-just-unpack-white-identity-atYkkIx

20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Alan Ritchson
"There will be no Homeland Security until we realize that the entire planet is our homeland. Every sentient being in the world must feel secure." - John Perkins So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Amazing how socialism becomes perfectly acceptable the moment it happens to a senator.
item.description: So let me get this straight. A man can disappear from public view for nearly a month, keep collecting a taxpayer-funded paycheck, receive world-class healthcare, and enjoy guaranteed leave... ...while millions of Americans are told those exact benefits are economically impossible. What a fucking miracle. The most impressive thing Fuckhead Mitch McConnell ever built wasn't legislation. It was a political system where politicians can spend decades explaining why ordinary people don't deserve basic security... then personally enjoy every single benefit the second they need it. That's not irony. That's industrial-scale hypocrisy. Imagine telling a warehouse worker: "Sorry, paid leave isn't realistic." Then watching a senator vanish for weeks while still collecting a salary, healthcare, and job security. Apparently socialism is a dangerous threat to freedom right up until it's happening directly to the people warning us about it. It's amazing how quickly "personal responsibility" transforms into "please spare no expense" when the patient has a Senate office and a government pension. The ladder always seems to disappear right after they climb it. Hopefully the motherfucker suffers. #MitchMcConnell #Healthcare #LivingWage #PaidLeave #Congress #Politics #Hypocrisy #WorkersRights
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Get ready for "you alone nothing and be happy" peasants
item.description: Maybe you're waiting for a charismatic leader or a dramatic tipping point but most likely they are slowly getting more and more control and eventually they will be able to silence the media, you could lose your job lose your freedom or you could even lose your life if you step out of line. Remember everyday they're building more of an army of ignorant selfish fanatics willing to defend them.

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.title: Another One
item.description: Original story: https://www.cbsnews.com/minnesota/news/justin-eichorn-minnesota-republican-state-sen-charged-prostitution/ But he pleaded guilty to a lesser charge: https://www.cbsnews.com/minnesota/news/justin-eichorn-sex-sting-change-of-plea/ He’s in jail awaiting a sentencing hearing, not in priosn as some have said. “Eichorn’s attorney stated...his client has no criminal history, is dealing with medical issues – including carpal tunnel syndrome – and has a divorce hearing coming up in June.” Did excessive masturbation cause his carpal tunnel syndrome? I bet his arrest caused his divorce.
item.dc:creator: Resistance1000

item.title: GovBrief Today #525
item.description: Donald Trump emailed termination notices to the two Democrats who oversee America's voting machines and let the lone Republican resign. Congress built the Election Assistance Commission with two Democrats and two Republicans so that neither party controls it. Four months before the midterms, the commission cannot legally act. The White House says the president can remove anyone not "totally aligned" with securing elections. Firing the Democrats while sparing the Republican tells you what aligned means. Trump already ordered this commission to add a proof of citizenship requirement to the voter registration form, and its commissioners refused. Now there are no commissioners. I've emailed 8,166 stories over 525 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260709-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-july9 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/michigan-parasite [3] https://go.govbrief.today/election-commission-firings [4] https://go.govbrief.today/chicago-usatty [5] https://go.govbrief.today/doj-sues-maryland [6] https://go.govbrief.today/illinois-guns [7] https://go.govbrief.today/shooter-hunger-strike [8] https://go.govbrief.today/ufc-drone-plot [9] https://go.govbrief.today/hearn-plea [10] https://go.govbrief.today/houston-shooting [11] https://go.govbrief.today/portico-repair [12] https://go.govbrief.today/usda-doubt [13] https://go.govbrief.today/arch-preliminary [14] https://go.govbrief.today/pbi-djt [15] https://go.govbrief.today/charm-city-cleanup [16] https://go.govbrief.today/tacoma-detention-access Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Calf visits the beach for the first time
item.dc:creator: IliveIdyeIliveagain

item.title: An Atlas a day!
item.description:
JFC, can we please be done with fireworks. I hate them with a passion for a multitude of reasons and this is one. He’s really struggling with them and they’re fucking endless. I was out of trazodone for him and all I could do was sit with him and pet him.
I called the vet to get more trazodone, but I had to drive to Boston today for yet another doctors appointment that gave me no new answers and more bad news. I hate my body, but I’ve got to keep it going because I have a scared little dumpster orphan to protect. Much love, from two dumpster orphans.
item.dc:creator: AtlasHuggedrescuepup

item.title: To Scruffy
item.description:
I fucking hate making these posts but I’ve made my pets such an integral part of who I am on Imgur and you guys loved Scruffy so I feel I owe it to him.
Scruffy went to the emergency vet tonight with symptoms I figured were heart related.
As soon as my mom told me what was going on I knew he would not be leaving with them and that’s the worst feeling when you know before his primary owners-
We weren’t really looking for a a dog in 2017 but my mom is a big fan of Petfinder and saw this strange little alien creature and we scheduled a meet and greet
He obviously came home with us
We hadn’t told my stepdad so it was a fun little surprise when he came home
The first time he got wet
We became obsessed with his little underbite
The vet came back and told them that his heart was enlarged with free fluid around his chest cavity
They also told her that if they could get him off of oxygen and he made a “recovery” he’d have to be on 3 different meds for the rest of his life and they gave him a life expectancy of no more than a year
My mom asked me what I would do as his sister and vet tech
Which is just about the worst question I’ve ever been asked
But I know she just needed to have someone tell her she was doing the right thing which is a role she’s had to play for me with what happened with Paulie
I told her that the prognosis wasn’t good but that they should wait for the bill to see how much it would cost to have him stay on the oxygen for the next 48 hours
The bill was astronomical
My heart is breaking typing this again because that’s the reason I couldn’t save Paulie- it always comes back to cost
So they made the hardest decision that comes from being a pet owner
We had scruffy for 9 amazing years
He filled that house with so much laughter and love where none would have otherwise existed
He was with my mom through a divorce and a wedding to the same man… in that order
He had lived in 3 states
And went through probably 7 moves
He stuck his tongue out in like every picture
He bewitched everybody with his charming underbite
(Even if he did try to bite people with it)
This is how you know he was my brother- look at this the resemblance is uncanny
He had the most stylish Mohawk
Tbis is one of my favorite pictures of him. After I moved (got kicked out) my mom had asked me to watch the dogs for them while they went camping
When I went over there I noticed he was chewing on one of his bones and I left him to it- he was having a ton of fun clearly
Only for him to leave it on the carpet and I realized he was eating STICK BLUSH!! And he got it ALL OVER HIMSELF AND THE CARPET!!
My one job was to watch the dogs but in my defense he was already chewing on it when I got there so like
Nessie petrified him
She was an enigma he never learned how o decipher
He was capable of making the saddest face you’ve ever seen in your life
Shoutout to @AshesVonDust who was his biggest fan and said the funniest thing I’ve ever heard someone say about him “Liza Jane and Froggy: yay! The holidays! Scruffy: the wind makes me remember” LMFAOOOOOO
Thank you to anyone who ever made a meme of him- they always brought me immeasurable joy
I’m sorry if you made one of these and I don’t tag you I totally forgot everybody’s usernames
This one is my favorite
His many facial expressions
Scruffy- thanks for being the best dog brother a girl could ask for. I’m gonna miss you so much
item.dc:creator: danat101
